summary: Stub TSX/Rust + Blocker Register + Assumption Quarantine Ledger is a source packet for this is the most implementation-ready of the mid-size packs: it ships not just docs but an actual numbered patch packet (directory 12_WorkflowSpine_Tranche_PatchPacket/) containing stub source files for six new React components plus a schema diff, a runtime TypeScript file, and a Rust command-shapes file.
final_use_case: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Stub TSX/Rust + Blocker Register + Assumption Quarantine Ledger, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
